name: QA 1317
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1317

Muti-threading and __pmProcess*() family

valgrind variant, see qa/1316 for the non-valgrind variant



Copyright (c) 2021 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora41-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1317

Muti-threading and __pmProcess*() family

valgrind variant, see qa/1316 for the non-valgrind variant

Copyright (c) 2021 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora41-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1317.out.bad)
23a24,45
> Thread 4:
> Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
> at 0x499EAEF: _IO_flush_all (in /usr/lib64/libc.so.6)
> by 0x499F07C: _IO_cleanup (in /usr/lib64/libc.so.6)
> by 0x49B7A41: __libc_freeres (in /usr/lib64/libc.so.6)
> by 0x48431E7: _vgnU_freeres (vg_preloaded.c:103)
> by 0x48CB222: __pmProcessPipe (exec.c:612)
> by 0x4001F4E: func_C (multithread14.c:285)
> by 0x49A4723: start_thread (in /usr/lib64/libc.so.6)
> by 0x4A28613: clone (in /usr/lib64/libc.so.6)
> {
>    <insert_a_suppression_name_here>
>    Memcheck:Cond
>    fun:_IO_flush_all
>    fun:_IO_cleanup
>    fun:__libc_freeres
>    fun:_vgnU_freeres
>    fun:__pmProcessPipe
>    fun:func_C
>    fun:start_thread
>    fun:clone
> }
25a48,49
> Use --track-origins=yes to see where uninitialised values come from
> ERROR SUMMARY: 1 errors from 1 contexts ...
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
